
## Transmission information table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transmissionRaw = FileAttachment("data/transmission-info.csv").csv({typed: false})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transmissionColumns = transmissionRaw.length > 0
  ? Object.keys(transmissionRaw[0]).filter(c =>
      c &&
      c.trim() !== "" &&
      !/^_+$/.test(c.trim()) &&
      !c.startsWith("__") &&
      !c.toLowerCase().startsWith("unnamed")
    )
  : []
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transmissionTable = transmissionRaw.map(row =>
  Object.fromEntries(
    transmissionColumns.map(column => [column, row[column]])
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${transmissionTable.length}</strong> records loaded from this information table.<br>
<strong>${transmissionColumns.length}</strong> columns detected.
</div>`
```

### Search this table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof searched_transmission = Inputs.search(
  transmissionTable,
  {placeholder: "Search this table..."}
)
```

<details class="filter-panel">
<summary><strong>Filter this table</strong></summary>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transmissionCleanValue = value =>
  value === null || value === undefined ? "" : String(value).trim()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transmissionFilterableColumns = transmissionColumns.filter(column =>
  column &&
  column.trim() !== "" &&
  !/^_+$/.test(column.trim()) &&
  column.trim() !== "__evidence"
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transmissionFilterOptions = Object.fromEntries(
  transmissionFilterableColumns.map(column => [
    column,
    ["All", ...Array.from(
      new Set(
        transmissionTable
          .map(row => transmissionCleanValue(row[column]))
          .filter(value => value !== "")
      )
    ).sort()]
  ])
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedTransmissionFilters = Inputs.form(
  Object.fromEntries(
    transmissionFilterableColumns.map(column => [
      column,
      Inputs.select(transmissionFilterOptions[column], {label: column})
    ])
  )
)
```

</details>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filtered_transmission = searched_transmission.filter(row =>
  transmissionFilterableColumns.every(column =>
    selectedTransmissionFilters[column] === "All" ||
    transmissionCleanValue(row[column]) === selectedTransmissionFilters[column]
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${filtered_transmission.length}</strong> records shown after search and filters.
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(filtered_transmission, {
  columns: transmissionColumns,
  height: 500,
  select: false
})
```
